description:
Phase 3 (fz-ul4.23.3) landed `--emit clif` only. Asm disassembly was deferred because it needs additional Cranelift wiring (set_disasm + capstone) and asm output is platform-dependent.

## Deliverable

- `fz dump --emit asm` produces post-regalloc machine code text.
- `fz dump --emit both` produces CLIF then asm per fn.
- Capstone (or whatever cranelift_codegen exposes) is wired in.

## Acceptance

- `fz dump --emit asm fixtures/add1.fz` prints x86_64 (or arm64) asm with fn banners.
- Smoke test in fixture_matrix tests/.
- Source-loc interleaving lands via fz-ul4.27 (sibling).
title: fz dump --emit asm — disassembled machine code
